name: Cloth Merchant

ability.description: Gives +2 strength to adjacent cards in this row.

flavourText: His silks catch the light and the eye of every passerby.

name: Wool Merchant

ability.description: Gives +1 strength to all friendly cards in this row.

flavourText: Warm hands, warm heart, warm profit margins.

name: Rug Seller
flavourText: Every rug has a story. Most of them are made up.

name: Ruby Trader

ability.description: Gives +2 strength to adjacent cards in this row.

flavourText: She can spot a fake ruby at forty paces and a real sucker at twenty.

name: Gold Curator

ability.description: Gives +1 strength to all friendly cards in this row.

flavourText: Catalogues every coin. Trusts no one with the keys.

name: Relic Broker

ability.description: Gains +4 strength if you are losing the round.

flavourText: Desperate times call for desperate markups.

name: Saffron Merchant
flavourText: Worth more than gold by weight. He reminds you of this constantly.

name: Herb Peddler

ability.description: Gains +2 strength for each other friendly card in this row.

flavourText: Knows every leaf, root, and fungus. Prescribes all three for headaches.

name: Pepper Seller

ability.description: Gives +2 strength to adjacent cards in this row.

flavourText: His stall makes your eyes water from three streets away.

name: Highwayman

ability.description: Suppresses the opponent's Treasures empire for this round.

flavourText: Your gold or your life. Ideally both.

name: Bazaar Guard
flavourText: Keeps the peace. Badly. But enthusiastically.

name: Camel Driver

ability.description: Gives +1 strength to all friendly cards in this row.

flavourText: The camel does the work. He takes the credit.

name: Fortune Teller

ability.description: Gains +5 strength when 3+ friendly cards are in this row.

flavourText: She predicted you would read this. She charges for that.

ability.description: Weakens the opponent's strongest card in this row by 3.

name: Water Bearer

ability.description: Gives +1 strength to all friendly cards in this row.

flavourText: In a desert, water is the real treasure.

name: Snake Charmer

ability.description: Gains +3 strength if you are losing the round.

flavourText: The snake does what the snake wants. He just plays the music.

name: Jewel Appraiser

ability.description: Gains +1 strength for each other friendly card in this row.

flavourText: Knows the price of everything and the value of nothing.

name: Carpet Weaver

ability.description: Gains +2 strength for each other friendly card in this row.

flavourText: Each knot tells a story. She has tied thousands.
